title: LRC - JUIT
content: Inter Library Loan (ILL) Service The LRC is a member of Developing Library Network (DELNET). DELNET offers access to union catalogue of over 2000 libraries of India and SAARC countries. Users may use this facility in case they may not get their needed books, journals, articles, etc in the LRC. DELNET coordinates with other members to arrange needed document on loan for short period (15 days) against request of the member library. DELNET levies a nominal charge towards photocopying and postage for each request. User may search union catalogues and other databases of DELNET through the World Wide Web using the following procedure. URL: http://www.delnet.nic.in (The access is through IP range of the institute, hence no login credentials are required to access the DELNET portal) Alternatively, one may access the old portal using the following credentials. URL: http://164.100.247.17/ Login: 		hpjuits Password: 	juit559 User may search the resources but cannot place their request directly. They need to make a request for any material through LRC.
